ns0:entry.ns0:title: AppFlowy-IO/AppFlowy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AppFlowy-IO/AppFlowy
Language: dart
Bring projects, wikis, and teams together with AI. AppFlowy is the AI collaborative workspace where you achieve more without losing control of your data. The leading open source Notion alternative.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: BasedHardware/omi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BasedHardware/omi
Language: dart
AI that sees your screen, listens to your conversations and tells you what to do

ns0:entry.ns0:title: FoxSensei001/LoveIwara
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/FoxSensei001/LoveIwara
Language: dart
Love Iwara (i-iwara or 2i). An unofficial iwara flutter app - Supporting multiple platforms and devices including mobile phones, tablets and computers. Compatible with Android, Windows and other systems. 第三方的Iwara应用 - 支持多个平台和设备，包括手机、平板和计算机。兼容 安卓、IOS、Windows、MacOS等系统。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: KRTirtho/spotube
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/KRTirtho/spotube
Language: dart
🎧 Open source music streaming app! Available for both desktop & mobile!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: KaringX/clashmi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/KaringX/clashmi
Language: dart
Clash Mihomo for iOS/MacOS/Android/Windows/Linux

ns0:entry.ns0:title: KaringX/karing
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/KaringX/karing
Language: dart
Simple & Powerful proxy utility, Support routing rules for clash/sing-box

ns0:entry.ns0:title: UnboundTechCo/defyxVPN
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/UnboundTechCo/defyxVPN
Language: dart
A modern, secure VPN application built with Flutter that provides internet freedom and privacy protection.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/UnicornsOnLSD/finamp

Language: dart

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cake-tech/cake_wallet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cake-tech/cake_wallet
Language: dart
The open source repository for Cake Wallet, a noncustodial multi-currency wallet, and Monero.com, a noncustodial Monero-only wallet. Need help? Check out https://docs.cakewallet.com

ns0:entry.ns0:title: chen08209/FlClash
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/chen08209/FlClash
Language: dart
A multi-platform proxy client based on ClashMeta,simple and easy to use, open-source and ad-free.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dart-lang/sdk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dart-lang/sdk
Language: dart
The Dart SDK, including the VM, JS and Wasm compilers, analysis, core libraries, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: deckerst/aves
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/deckerst/aves
Language: dart
Aves is a gallery and metadata explorer app, built for Android with Flutter.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: flutter/flutter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/flutter/flutter
Language: dart
Flutter makes it easy and fast to build beautiful apps for mobile and beyond

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/flutter/samples
Language: dart
A collection of Flutter examples and demos

ns0:entry.ns0:title: fluxerapp/flutter_client
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fluxerapp/flutter_client
Language: dart

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hiddify/hiddify-app
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hiddify/hiddify-app
Language: dart
Multi-platform auto-proxy client, supporting Sing-box, X-ray, TUIC, Hysteria, Reality, Trojan, SSH etc. It’s an open-source, secure and ad-free.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kodjodevf/mangayomi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kodjodevf/mangayomi
Language: dart
Free and open source application for reading manga, novels, and watching animes available on Android, iOS, macOS, Linux and Windows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: localsend/localsend
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/localsend/localsend
Language: dart
An open-source cross-platform alternative to AirDrop

ns0:entry.ns0:title: techjarves/Uncensored-Local-AI-Multiplatform
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/techjarves/Uncensored-Local-AI-Multiplatform
Language: dart
A cross-platform Flutter app that runs uncensored, 100% offline open-source AI models (GGUF) directly on your Android, iOS, or PC. No cloud, no filters, total privacy.
